'''鈭歬-n-ng''' ('''kananga''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:lysogenize|lysogenize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-n-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lysogenize|lysogenize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歬-n-ng
|-
! Lemma
| kananga
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:kanangithi|kanangithi]] || [[word:kanangiji|kanangiji]] || [[word:kanangishi|kanangishi]] || [[word:kanangi|kanangi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:kananguthuth|kananguthuth]] || [[word:kanangujuj|kanangujuj]] || [[word:kanangushush|kanangushush]] || [[word:kanang|kanang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:kananguthu|kananguthu]] || [[word:kananguju|kananguju]] || [[word:kanangushu|kanangushu]] || [[word:kanangu|kanangu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:kanangufuth|kanangufuth]] || [[word:kanangufuj|kanangufuj]] || [[word:kanangufush|kanangufush]] || [[word:kananguf|kananguf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:kanangethe|kanangethe]] || [[word:kanangeje|kanangeje]] || [[word:kanangeshe|kanangeshe]] || [[word:kanange|kanange]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:kanangothoth|kanangothoth]] || [[word:kanangojoj|kanangojoj]] || [[word:kanangoshosh|kanangoshosh]] || [[word:kanang|kanang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:kanangotho|kanangotho]] || [[word:kanangojo|kanangojo]] || [[word:kanangosho|kanangosho]] || [[word:kanango|kanango]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:kanangofoth|kanangofoth]] || [[word:kanangofoj|kanangofoj]] || [[word:kanangofosh|kanangofosh]] || [[word:kanangof|kanangof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:kanang忙th忙|kanang忙th忙]] || [[word:kanang忙j忙|kanang忙j忙]] || [[word:kanang忙sh忙|kanang忙sh忙]] || [[word:kanang忙|kanang忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:kanangathath|kanangathath]] || [[word:kanangajaj|kanangajaj]] || [[word:kanangashash|kanangashash]] || [[word:kanang|kanang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:kanangatha|kanangatha]] || [[word:kanangaja|kanangaja]] || [[word:kanangasha|kanangasha]] || [[word:kananga|kananga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:kanangafath|kanangafath]] || [[word:kanangafaj|kanangafaj]] || [[word:kanangafash|kanangafash]] || [[word:kanangaf|kanangaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:kanangasha|kanangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gokanangasha|gokanangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokikanangasha|gokikanangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:kanangn眉sha|kanangn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokanangnkn眉sha|gokanangnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokikanangn眉sha|gokikanangn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:kanangsh毛sha|kanangsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokanangnksh毛sha|gokanangnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokikanangsh毛sha|gokikanangsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kanangrosha|kanangrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokanangnkrosha|gokanangnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokikanangrosha|gokikanangrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kanangmusha|kanangmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokanangnkmusha|gokanangnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikanangmusha|gokikanangmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:kanangsherasha|kanangsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokanangnksherasha|gokanangnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokikanangsherasha|gokikanangsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:kanangasha|kanangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokanangnkngasha|gokanangnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokikanangasha|gokikanangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kanangyasha|kanangyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokanangnkyasha|gokanangnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokikanangyasha|gokikanangyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:kanangyamasha|kanangyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokanangnkyamasha|gokanangnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokikanangyamasha|gokikanangyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:kanangn眉sh毛sha|kanangn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokanangnkn眉sh毛sha|gokanangnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokikanangn眉sh毛sha|gokikanangn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:kanangn眉rosha|kanangn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokanangnkn眉rosha|gokanangnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokikanangn眉rosha|gokikanangn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kanangn眉musha|kanangn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokanangnkn眉musha|gokanangnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikanangn眉musha|gokikanangn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:kanangsh毛n眉sha|kanangsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokanangnksh毛n眉sha|gokanangnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokikanangsh毛n眉sha|gokikanangsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:kanangsh毛rosha|kanangsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokanangnksh毛rosha|gokanangnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokikanangsh毛rosha|gokikanangsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kanangsh毛musha|kanangsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokanangnksh毛musha|gokanangnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikanangsh毛musha|gokikanangsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:kanangron眉sha|kanangron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokanangnkron眉sha|gokanangnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokikanangron眉sha|gokikanangron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:kanangrosh毛sha|kanangrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokanangnkrosh毛sha|gokanangnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokikanangrosh毛sha|gokikanangrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kanangromusha|kanangromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokanangnkromusha|gokanangnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikanangromusha|gokikanangromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:kanangmun眉sha|kanangmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokanangnkmun眉sha|gokanangnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokikanangmun眉sha|gokikanangmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:kanangmush毛sha|kanangmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokanangnkmush毛sha|gokanangnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokikanangmush毛sha|gokikanangmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:kanangmurosha|kanangmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokanangnkmurosha|gokanangnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokikanangmurosha|gokikanangmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:kanang|kanang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:k忙n忙ng|k忙n忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hokanang|hokanang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hok忙n忙ng|hok忙n忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohokanang|hohokanang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohok忙n忙ng|hohok忙n忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉kanang|n眉kanang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉k忙n忙ng|n眉k忙n忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉kanang|n眉n眉kanang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉k忙n忙ng|n眉n眉k忙n忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂kanang|n茂kanang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂k忙n忙ng|n茂k忙n忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂kanang|n茂n茂kanang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂k忙n忙ng|n茂n茂k忙n忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lukanang|lukanang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luk忙n忙ng|luk忙n忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulukanang|lulukanang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluk忙n忙ng|luluk忙n忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:likanang|likanang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lik忙n忙ng|lik忙n忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilikanang|lilikanang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilik忙n忙ng|lilik忙n忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kokanang|kokanang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kok忙n忙ng|kok忙n忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokokanang|kokokanang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokok忙n忙ng|kokok忙n忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kekanang|kekanang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kek忙n忙ng|kek忙n忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekekanang|kekekanang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekek忙n忙ng|kekek忙n忙ng]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
